step1.heading: Basic information
step1.intro: Title, description, cover image and schedule.
step1.coverImageHelp: Shown on the public event page and invitation emails.
step1.waitingRoomAudioHelp: Played before the live call starts.
step1.parseTitleKickerHelp: When on, a title like 'CONFERENCE | Digital innovation' renders CONFERENCE as a small kicker line above the main title.
step1.maxParticipantsHelp: Estimate the maximum number of participants. Drives video server capacity and waiting-room UI.

validation.endsAt: End date must be after start date.

step1.senderRatioHelp: How many participants you expect to have mic/camera active. Helps size the video server.

step2.heading: Who can do what
step2.intro: Permission matrix: pick which roles can use each feature. Moderators can always do everything.

qa.label: Q&A
qa.desc: Submit questions to the Q&A panel.

chat.label: Chat
chat.desc: Post messages in the group chat.

step3.heading: People and invites
step3.intro: Add organizers (shown on the page), moderators, speakers, and invited guests.
step3.organizersHelp: Appear on the public event page.
step3.organizerRequired: Contact name and organization are required.
step3.moderatorsHelp: Moderators can manage the session and control permissions during the event.
step3.speakersHelp: Receive a moderator link via email.
step3.invitationsHelp: Pre-registered attendees — each gets a personal join link.

step4.heading: Content and materials
step4.intro: Attach materials and link pre/post-event questionnaires.
step4.materialsHelp: Documents, slides, and links to share before, during or after the event.
step4.questionnairesIntro: Combine reusable templates with questions specific to this event.
step4.questionnairesEmpty: No questionnaires available. Create one from Settings → Questionnaires.
step4.templatesEmpty: No templates created. Go to Settings → Questionnaires.
step4.saveDraftAndGoQuestionnaires: Save draft and go to questionnaire management

step5.heading: Review and publish
step5.intro: Double-check and publish (or save as draft).
step5.retentionHelp: After this threshold, personal data is automatically deleted.
step5.privacyDocHelp: Upload a PDF or paste the URL of an alternative privacy notice. Overrides the GDPR template when set.
step5.privacyTextHelp: Short text shown on the registration form; can complement or replace the GDPR template.

orphans.intro: These recordings exist in the storage bucket but are not linked to any event or session in the database. They will be automatically deleted {days} days after discovery. You can mark them as "Keep" to preserve them, "Delete now" to remove on the next cron run, or leave them pending until the timeout.

form.expectedParticipantsHint: Just an estimate for infrastructure sizing. This is not a hard cap: registrations beyond this number are accepted and the infra scales automatically.
form.expectedSenderRatioHint: Percentage of attendees with mic or webcam on. Classic webinar 10-20%, panel 50-100%. Leave empty to inherit the site default.

jvbPreview.title: Estimated JVB capacity
jvbPreview.videoDisabled: Video disabled: all attendees count as receivers.
jvbPreview.warnInherited: With {participants} attendees and the inherited ratio ({defaultPct}%), the estimate relies on the site default. Large events should set an explicit value (webinar 5-20%, meeting 30%, workshop 60%).
jvbPreview.warnCeiling: Estimate at the configured max ({max} pods). If real attendance or senders exceed the estimate, bridges may saturate. Consider raising the cap or lowering maxParticipants.

form.gracePeriodHint: How many minutes past the scheduled end to keep the call open. Shown as a non-intrusive banner to attendees during overtime.
form.autoStartRecordingDesc: When the event starts, recording begins on its own (the moderator is not prompted). Late joiners immediately find a catch-up player available.
form.dataRetentionDays: Coinneáil sonraí (laethanta tar éis an imeachta)
form.dataRetentionHint: Tar éis na tréimhse seo, scriosfar clárúcháin na rannpháirtithe, ceisteanna Q&A agus aon taifeadadh físe go huathoibríoch.
form.waitingRoomAudioUrlHint: Cuir isteach URL comhaid MP3 le haghaidh ceol sa seomra feithimh. Fágaigí folamh chun an fhuaim réamhshocraithe a úsáid.
form.requireOrganizationDesc: Caithfidh rannpháirtithe a n-eagraíocht a lua
form.requireOrganizationRoleDesc: Is féidir le rannpháirtithe a ról a lua
form.participantsCanUnmute: Is féidir le rannpháirtithe an micreafón a ghníomhachtú
form.participantsCanStartVideo: Is féidir le rannpháirtithe an ceamara gréasáin a ghníomhachtú
form.participantsCanShareScreen: Is féidir le rannpháirtithe an scáileán a roinnt
form.permissionsOnDesc: Is féidir le rannpháirtithe iad a ghníomhachtú go neamhspleách
form.permissionsOffDesc: Ní féidir ach le modhnóirí iad a ghníomhachtú. Caithfidh rannpháirtithe a lámh a ardú.
form.permissionsNote: Baineann athruithe ar cheadanna le rannpháirtithe nua.
form.privacyPolicyTemplateEmpty: This template has no text yet. Edit it from Settings › GDPR templates.
form.privacyPolicyTemplateHint: Templates are managed under Settings › GDPR templates. ★ marks the default.
form.privacyPolicyTextHint: Scríobh téacs an bheartais phríobháideachta. Taispeánfar é go hinlíne san fhoirm chláraithe.
form.retentionPreviewIntro: Tar éis {days} lá ó dheireadh an imeachta, scriosfar go huathoibríoch:

coModerators.title: Comhmhodhnóirí agus cainteoirí
coModerators.intro: Cuir comhmhodhnóirí agus cainteoirí leis trí naisc dhraíochta ar leith.
coModerators.introHint: Tá ainm ar leith ag gach duine sa seomra agus comhartha is féidir a chúlghairm go neamhspleách ón bpríomhnasc. Tá micreafón, ceamara agus comhroinnt scáileáin ag cainteoirí ach ní féidir leo modhnóireacht a dhéanamh (ciceáil amach, gach duine a chiúiniú, taifeadadh).
coModerators.name: Ainm infheicthe sa seomra
coModerators.emailPlaceholder: chun an nasc a sheoladh chucu
coModerators.roleModeratorHint: Lánmhodhnóireacht: is féidir taifeadadh, gach duine a chiúiniú agus rannpháirtithe a bhaint.
coModerators.roleSpeakerHint: Is féidir labhairt, físeán a thaispeáint agus scáileán a chomhroinnt. Ní féidir an seomra a mhodhnóireacht.
coModerators.confirmRevoke: Rochtain an duine seo a chúlghairm? Stopfaidh an nasc ag obair láithreach.
coModerators.empty: Ní tugadh aon rochtain bhreise. Is é an príomhnasc modhnóra an t-aon slí isteach phribhléideach.

settings.title: Socruithe an tsuímh
settings.subtitle: Cumraigh cuma agus iompar an ardáin le haghaidh athúsáide RA

sections.languagesDescription: Cumasaigh nó díchumasaigh na teangacha AE atá ar fáil d'úsáideoirí, roghnaigh an teanga réamhshocraithe agus saincheap na haistriúcháin.
sections.gdprTemplatesDescription: Cruthaigh fógraí príobháideachta in-athúsáidte is féidir a nascadh le himeachtaí ar bith, agus roghnaigh an ceann réamhshocraithe do imeachtaí nua.
sections.emailTemplatesDescription: Saincheap ábhar, cinnteidil agus téacs na ríomhphost deimhnithe agus meabhrúcháin. Fág folamh chun na téacsanna réamhshocraithe a úsáid.
sections.tagsDescription: Create and edit the tags used to filter events

scaling.intro: Parameters that describe the cluster capacity the platform runs on. Defaults are calibrated for Azure F16s_v2 (16 vCPU / 32 GiB) for JVB and F4s_v2 (4 vCPU / 8 GiB) for Jibri. On different hardware tweak these — the scaler recomputes immediately.
scaling.jvbCpuCoresPerPodHelp: CPU cores requested by the JVB container (resources.requests.cpu). Azure F16s_v2 = 16.
scaling.jvbReceiversPerCoreHelp: How many receive-only viewers fit in 1 vCPU. Calibrated to 18.75 (300 webinar ÷ 16 cores) on F16s_v2.
scaling.jvbSendersPerCoreHelp: How many senders (mic+webcam) fit in 1 vCPU. Calibrated to 3.125 (50 all-sender ÷ 16 cores) on F16s_v2.
scaling.jvbMaxReplicasHelp: Hard cap to prevent runaway scale-up. Default 6.
scaling.jibriCpuCoresPerPodHelp: Cores requested by the Jibri container (ffmpeg + headless Chrome). Azure F4s_v2 = 4.
scaling.defaultSenderRatioPctHelp: Share of expected participants that will actually send media (mic+webcam) when the event doesn't specify. Webinar 10-30%, panel 50-100%.
scaling.previewBody: Event with {participants} expected attendees at {ratio}% senders → {senders} senders + {receivers} passive → {cores} estimated cores → {jvbs} JVBs.
scaling.eventGracePeriodMinutesHelp: Extra time granted after the scheduled end before closing the call. 0 = hard stop, -1 = never auto-close (let the idle-cleanup decide), 15 = banner then close after 15 minutes. Each event can override.

features.guestAccessEnabledHelp: Ceadaigh rochtain aonna ar imeachtaí beo
features.publicRegistrationEnabledHelp: Is féidir le duine ar bith imeachtaí a chruthú (má tá sé díchumasaithe, riarthóirí amháin)
features.calendarPublicHelp: Foilsigh féilire na n-imeachtaí. Is féidir le cuairteoirí imeachtaí beartaithe a fheiceáil.
features.parseTitleKickerHelp: If an event title contains the "|" character, the part before it is rendered as a small uppercase label above the main title. Example: "Coffee chat | Trying the new OSS tool" → label "COFFEE CHAT" + title "Trying the new OSS tool".
features.jvbScalingHelp: Control how long to wait before shutting down an idle video node, and how early to start it for a scheduled event.
features.jvbInactiveGraceMinutesHelp: How long the conference must stay empty before the video node is scaled down. Recommended 45 minutes. Range 5-240.
features.jvbPreScaleMinutesHelp: How many minutes before startsAt to boot the video node for a scheduled event. Recommended 10 minutes.
features.jvbStressWarnPercentHelp: Above this threshold the scaler adds 1 extra JVB replica even if predictive sizing doesn't require it. Default 50.
features.jvbStressCriticalPercentHelp: Above this threshold the scaler adds 2 extra JVB replicas. Default 70. Must be higher than warn.
features.jvbProvisioningTimeoutMinutesHelp: After how many minutes since startsAt an event without JVB ready is flagged as 'degraded' on the status page. Default 15. Covers node cold-start (~3-5 min) plus safety margin.
features.statusPollIntervalSecondsHelp: How often the /status page refreshes from the browser. Default 30. Lower values = fresher data but more load on the app.

instantCall.title: Glao físe láithreach
instantCall.subtitle: Cruthaigh glao físe ar an toirt agus roinnigh an nasc. Ní theastaíonn sceidealú.
instantCall.passwordHint: If set, guests must type this password to join. Minimum 4 characters. Moderators don't need it.
instantCall.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
instantCall.maxParticipantsHint: Raise this if you expect a larger audience: the scaler uses this number to decide how many JVB replicas to allocate. Instant calls have no pre-scaling, so for more than ~50 participants prefer a scheduled event with at least 15 minutes' lead time.
instantCall.hint: Is féidir le gach duine micreafón, ceamara gréasáin a ghníomhachtú agus an scáileán a roinnt. Ní féidir ach libhse taifeadadh agus an glao a chríochnú.

files.noFiles: Gan comhad uaslódáilte. Úsáid an cnaipe "Uaslódáil comhad" chun ábhair a chur leis.

languages.saveNote: Éilíonn athruithe ar theangacha atá ar fáil atosú chun éifeacht a bheith acu in URLanna.

languages.overridesDescription: Sáraigh na haistriúcháin réamhshocraithe don teanga seo. Úsáid nodaireacht poncanna (m.sh. common.appName).

monitoring.scaleToZeroHelp: IDLE is the normal state for an event with no traffic past the grace period. On the next user visit it transitions to PROVISIONING and then LIVE.

reminders.maxReminders: Uasmhéid 5 mheabhrúchán in aghaidh an imeachta.

consent.recording: Toilím le taifeadadh fuaime/físe an imeachta seo
consent.recordingRequired: Tá toiliú leis an taifeadadh riachtanach chun páirt a ghlacadh san imeacht seo

consent.addressBookHelp: Separate consent (GDPR art. 6.1.a). You can withdraw it at any time using the "Remove me from the address book" link in emails. Your name and organization are taken from your registration profile.

export.title: Mo chuid sonraí
export.subtitle: Iarr cóip de na sonraí pearsanta a bhaineann le bhur seoladh ríomhphoist, mar a fhoráiltear in Airteagal 15 de GDPR.
export.emailPlaceholder: Cuir isteach an ríomhphost a úsáideadh le haghaidh cláraithe
export.emailInvalid: Cuir isteach seoladh ríomhphoist bailí, le bhur dtoil
export.noData: Níor aimsíodh aon sonraí don seoladh ríomhphoist seo.
export.error: Tharla earráid. Bain triail eile as ar ball, le bhur dtoil.
export.rateLimited: An iomarca iarratas. Bain triail eile as i gceann uaire.
export.resultsDescription: Aimsíodh sonraí a bhaineann le {count} imeacht.

privacy.title: Beartas príobháideachta
privacy.intro: Déanann an leathanach seo achoimre ar phróiseáil sonraí pearsanta a bhaineann le húsáid ardáin Eventi DTD agus le rannpháirtíocht in imeachtaí poiblí óstáilte.

controller.title: Rialaitheoir sonraí
controller.body: Próiseáiltear sonraí pearsanta laistigh de ghníomhaíochtaí institiúideacha na Roinne um Chlaochlú Digiteach chun tacú le bainistíocht theicniúil agus eagraíochtúil imeachtaí poiblí ar líne.

data.title: Sonraí próiseáilte agus cuspóirí
data.body: Ní phróiseálann an t-ardán ach na sonraí atá go docht riachtanach le haghaidh cláraithe agus rannpháirtíochta in imeachtaí, mar shampla ainm, seoladh ríomhphoist agus aon réimsí roghnacha arna gcumrú ag an eagraí. Úsáidtear sonraí chun an nasc rochtana pearsanta a sheoladh, freastal a bhainistiú, meabhrúcháin a sheachadadh nuair is infheidhme, agus tacú le hoibleagáidí slándála na seirbhíse.

retention.title: Coinneáil agus cearta
retention.body: Coinnítear sonraí ar feadh na tréimhse atá cumraithe do gach imeacht agus scriostar go huathoibríoch iad ina dhiaidh sin, mura bhfuil oibleagáidí dlíthiúla éagsúla i bhfeidhm. Is féidir le hábhair sonraí a gcearta GDPR a fheidhmiú am ar bith, lena n-áirítear rochtain, ceartú agus léirscriosadh, trí bhealaí institiúideacha na Roinne.

note.title: Iarr bhur gcuid sonraí
note.body: Más rud é gur ghlac sibh páirt in imeacht agus gur mian libh a fhíorú cé na sonraí pearsanta atá bainteach le bhur seoladh ríomhphoist, is féidir libh an ghné thiomnaithe atá ar fáil ar an ardán a úsáid.

accessibility.title: Ráiteas inrochtaineachta
accessibility.intro: Tá an Roinn um Chlaochlú Digiteach tiomanta an t-ardán seo a dhéanamh inrochtana, i gcomhréir leis na ceanglais infheidhme do sheirbhísí digiteacha na hearnála poiblí.

commitment.title: Tiomantas don inrochtaineacht
commitment.body: Tá an t-ardán deartha le comhpháirteanna atá ailínithe le córas deartha .italia agus le haird ar nascleanúint méarchláir, struchtúr séimeantach ábhair agus inléiteacht an chomhéadain ar na príomhmhéideanna scáileáin.

status.title: Stádas comhlíontachta
status.body: Tá seiceálacha agus feabhsúcháin inrochtaineachta ar siúl go leanúnach. Réitítear aon saincheisteanna iarmharacha de réir a chéile mar chuid d'fhorbairt na seirbhíse agus de ghníomhaíochtaí cothabhála rialta.

feedback.title: Aiseolas agus teagmhálacha
feedback.body: Chun bacainní inrochtaineachta nó deacrachtaí le húsáid na seirbhíse a thuairisciú, is féidir le húsáideoirí teagmháil a dhéanamh leis an Roinn trína bealaí institiúideacha, ag sonrú an leathanaigh lena mbaineann agus cur síos gairid ar an bhfadhb.

legalNotes.title: Nótaí dlíthiúla
legalNotes.intro: Tá rochtain ar ardán Eventi DTD agus a úsáid faoi réir na nótaí seo, a dhéanann achoimre ar na téarmaí ginearálta úsáide agus ar an bpríomheolas faoin tseirbhís.

ownership.title: Úinéireacht na seirbhíse
ownership.body: Cuireann an Roinn um Chlaochlú Digiteach an t-ardán chun cinn agus cuirtear ar fáil é le haghaidh eagrú agus rannpháirtíochta in imeachtaí poiblí institiúideacha ar líne.

usage.title: Úsáid na seirbhíse
usage.body: Ní mór d'úsáideoirí an tseirbhís a úsáid i gceart gan slándáil an ardáin, infhaighteacht gnéithe nó rith ceart imeachtaí a chur i mbaol. D'fhéadfadh srianta rochtana ar an tseirbhís a bheith mar thoradh ar mhí-úsáid.

liability.title: Teorannú dliteanais
liability.body: Cé go nglactar bearta teicniúla agus eagraíochtúla cuí, ní féidir leis an Roinn asláithreacht iomlán bristeacha nó mífheidhmithe a ráthú de dheasca teagmhas gan choinne, gníomhaíochtaí cothabhála nó fachtóirí seachtracha. Tá freagrachtaí dlíthiúla fós faoi rialú ag an dlí infheidhme.

security.title: Slándáil agus trédhearcacht
security.intro: Tá cód foinse an ardáin seo poiblí agus faoi réir seiceálacha slándála uathoibrithe. Déanann an leathanach seo achoimre ar na huirlisí trédhearcachta atá ar fáil dóibh siúd a úsáideann an tseirbhís.

openSource.title: Bogearraí foinse oscailte
openSource.body: Tá an t-ardán iomlán foilsithe mar bhogearraí saor in aisce. Is féidir leis an duine ar bith an cód foinse a scrúdú, a íoslódáil agus a iniúchadh, i gcomhréir le prionsabail trédhearcachta Riaracháin Phoiblí na hIodáile.

sbom.title: SBOM (Bille Ábhar Bogearraí)
sbom.body: Cuimsíonn gach eisiúint a fhoilsítear ar GitHub SBOM san fhormáid SPDX don íomhá coimeádáin agus SBOM san fhormáid CycloneDX do spleáchais npm an fheidhmchláir. Tá na comhaid ceangailte go díreach leis an eisiúint agus is féidir iad a úsáid d'iniúchtaí slándála agus comhlíontachta.

scorecard.title: OpenSSF Scorecard
scorecard.body: Déanann OpenSSF Scorecard anailís ar an stór go tréimhsiúil, ag measúnú go huathoibríoch na mórán de chleachtais slándála an tionscadail (cosaint craoibhe, sreafaí oibre le pribhléidí íosta, commits sínithe, bainistiú spleáchais). Tá an scór reatha poiblí.

scanning.title: Scanadh uathoibrithe
scanning.body: Déantar monatóireacht leanúnach ar spleáchais trí Dependabot agus npm audit. Táirgeann an phíblíne eisiúna íomhánna inrianaithe tríd an lipéad org.opencontainers.image.revision, a nascann gach íomhá leis an gcommit cruinn óna tógadh í.

disclosure.title: Tuairisciú leochaileachtaí
disclosure.body: Tá an beartas nochta freagrach tuairiscithe sa chomhad SECURITY.md sa stór. Is féidir saincheisteanna slándála a thuairisciú faoi rún de réir na dtreoracha a thugtar ansin.

serviceInventory.title: Provider service inventory
serviceInventory.intro: For this instance, the document below lists both the software dependencies (DEV) and the operational services (OPS) that make up the platform. It is published in CycloneDX 1.6, an OWASP open standard that describes code libraries and third-party managed services in a single document.
serviceInventory.notPublishedBody: The operator of this instance has not yet published a service inventory. The SERVICE_INVENTORY_URL configuration variable has not been set for this deployment.
serviceInventory.fetchErrorBody: The inventory JSON file is currently unreachable. Please try again later or contact the service owner.

sections.componentsIntro: Libraries, containers and OS packages that form the application. Tied to the code version; reproducible by anyone with access to the source.
sections.servicesIntro: Third-party managed services this instance depends on. Tenant-scoped information that changes whenever the operator reconfigures the deployment or switches provider.

stack.title: Architecture at a glance
stack.intro: A high-level view of the four layers that make up the platform: from user access down to the runtime platform.

access.title: Access
access.sub: Web entry point and TLS termination

stack.note: The complete list of components and services, with versions, hashes and technical properties, is available in the sections above and in the downloadable JSON.

status.title: Stádas an chórais
status.subtitle: Forbhreathnú fíor-ama ar stádas seirbhísí an ardáin.
status.fetchError: Ní féidir stádas an chórais a fháil
status.jvbStandby: Ar fuireachas — gníomhachtaítear go huathoibríoch nuair is gá
status.jvbStandbyDetail: Scála-go-nialas gníomhach — gan imeacht beartaithe. Cruthófar nóid JVB go huathoibríoch roimh thús imeachta.
status.jvbOctoActive: Octo active: {bridges} bridges, {relayMbps} Mbps inter-bridge relay
status.staleJvbDetail: At least one active event has been waiting longer than the configured timeout and the video bridge isn't available yet. Check the cluster autoscaler or JVB pod logs.
status.staleJibriDetail: At least one event with recording enabled has been waiting longer than the configured timeout and Jibri isn't available yet.

infraMap.fetchError: Níorbh fhéidir sonraí bonneagair a lódáil
infraMap.title: Léarscáil bhonneagair
infraMap.subtitle: Léirshamhlú fíor-ama ar ailtireacht agus stádas na seirbhísí

descriptions.app: An suíomh gréasáin ina n-aimsíonn sibh imeachtaí
descriptions.database: An áit a stóráiltear imeachtaí agus clárúcháin
descriptions.redis: Real-time chat message exchange between servers
descriptions.jicofo: Comhordaíonn cé a ghlacann páirt i ngach comhdháil
descriptions.jvb: Tarchuireann fuaim agus físeán chuig rannpháirtithe

app.healthy: Tá an tairseach gréasáin ag obair i gceart agus ag freagairt d'iarratais.

database.healthy: Tá an bunachar sonraí ag freagairt i gceart.
database.degraded: Tá an bunachar sonraí ag freagairt, ach níos moille ná mar is gnách. D'fhéadfadh oibríochtaí níos mó ama a thógáil.
database.down: Níl an bunachar sonraí ag freagairt. Ní féidir leis an ardán feidhmiú i gceart.

redis.healthy: Real-time chat service is responding correctly.
redis.degraded: Real-time chat service is slow: messages may reach other servers with delay.
redis.down: Real-time chat service is unreachable. Live chat cannot fan out messages between servers — messages are still persisted to the database but users don't see each other in real time.

jitsiWeb.healthy: Tá an seomra físchomhdhála inrochtana agus réidh d'imeachtaí.
jitsiWeb.down: Níl an seomra físchomhdhála inrochtana. Ní féidir imeachtaí a thosú ná dul isteach iontu.

prosody.healthy: Tá teachtaireachtaí inmheánacha idir seirbhísí físeáin ag obair i gceart.
prosody.down: Níl na teachtaireachtaí inmheánacha inrochtana. Ní féidir le seirbhísí físeáin cumarsáid a dhéanamh le chéile.

jicofo.healthy: Tá an comhordaitheoir comhdhála gníomhach agus ag bainistiú seisiún.
jicofo.down: Níl an comhordaitheoir comhdhála inrochtana. Ní féidir comhdhálacha nua a chruthú.

jvb.healthy: Tá an droichead físeáin gníomhach agus ag tarchur fuaime/físeáin chuig rannpháirtithe.
jvb.scaling: Tá an droichead físeáin ag ullmhú d'imeacht atá le teacht. Tá freastalaithe á gcruthú go huathoibríoch.
jvb.standby: Tá an droichead físeáin ar fuireachas. Gníomhachtófar go huathoibríoch é roimh thús imeachta sceidealaithe.
jvb.stale: An event has been waiting for the video bridge longer than the configured timeout. Check the cluster autoscaler and JVB pod logs.

jibri.healthy: Tá an tseirbhís taifeadta réidh agus ar fáil.
jibri.busy: Tá an tseirbhís taifeadta gníomhach agus ag taifeadadh seisiúin atá ar siúl.
jibri.down: Níl an tseirbhís taifeadta inrochtana. Ní féidir imeachtaí a thaifeadadh.
jibri.standby: Níl taifeadadh físe cumraithe. Ní thaifeadfar imeachtaí.
jibri.unconfigured: Video recording is not configured (no storage backend). Events will not be recorded.
jibri.stale: An event with recording enabled has been waiting for Jibri longer than the configured timeout. Check Jibri pod logs.

smtp.healthy: Tá an tseirbhís ríomhphoist cumraithe agus réidh le fógraí a sheoladh.
smtp.standby: Níl an tseirbhís ríomhphoist cumraithe. Ní sheolfar ríomhphoist deimhnithe ná meabhrúcháin.

impacts.database: Ní féidir leis an ardán imeachtaí a lódáil, clárúcháin a bhainistiú, ná sonraí a shábháil.
impacts.redis: Live chat messages don't fan out across servers. Users only see messages sent on their own pod.
impacts.jitsiWeb: Ní féidir le rannpháirtithe rochtain a fháil ar an seomra físchomhdhála.
impacts.prosody: Ní féidir le seirbhísí físeáin cumarsáid a dhéanamh. Ní oibreoidh comhdhálacha.
impacts.jicofo: Ní féidir físchomhdhálacha nua a chruthú ná a bhainistiú.
impacts.jvbScaling: Tá an droichead físeáin á ghníomhachtú. Beidh an t-imeacht in ann tosú go luath.
impacts.jvbStale: An event has been waiting for the bridge longer than the configured timeout: participants cannot join.
impacts.jibri: Ní féidir imeachtaí a thaifeadadh. Is féidir le rannpháirtithe páirt a ghlacadh fós.
impacts.jibriStale: An event with recording enabled has been waiting for Jibri past the timeout: the session is not being recorded.
impacts.smtp: Ní sheolfar ríomhphoist deimhnithe clárúcháin ná meabhrúcháin.

overallVerdicts.operational: Tá gach seirbhís ag obair i gceart. Tá an t-ardán ag feidhmiú go hiomlán.
overallVerdicts.degraded: Tá moilliú ag tarlú i roinnt seirbhísí. Tá an t-ardán ag feidhmiú ach d'fhéadfadh an fheidhmíocht a bheith laghdaithe.
overallVerdicts.outage: Tá seirbhís amháin nó níos mó gan fáil. D'fhéadfadh gnéithe áirithe den ardán gan obair.

infraMap.verdictSectionSubtitle: Sonraí faoi sheirbhísí a dteastaíonn aird uathu

feedback.title: Conas a mheasann sibh an t-imeacht seo?
feedback.thankYou: Go raibh maith agaibh as bhur n-aiseolas!

wordcloud.title: Word Cloud
wordcloud.promptPlaceholder: m.sh. Cad a bhfuil sibh ag súil leis ón imeacht seo?
wordcloud.noActiveRound: Gan word cloud gníomhach faoi láthair.
wordcloud.noWords: Ag fanacht leis na chéad fhocail...

calendar.title: Féilire imeachtaí
calendar.subtitle: Féach ar na himeachtaí go léir le himeacht aimsire

footer.viewCommit: Féach ar an gcommit ar GitHub
footer.viewRelease: Féach ar an eisiúint ar GitHub

waiting.connectedParticipants: {count, plural, =0 {Gan rannpháirtí} =1 {1 rannpháirtí nasctha} one {# rannpháirtí nasctha} two {# rannpháirtí nasctha} few {# rannpháirtí nasctha} many {# rannpháirtí nasctha} other {{count} rannpháirtí nasctha}}
waiting.youAreLate: Thosaigh an t-imeacht {minutes} nóiméad ó shin
waiting.enterLiveDesc: Bí páirteach beo. Is féidir libh an taifeadadh a rochtain i gcónaí tar éis an imeachta.
waiting.watchFromStartDesc: Féach ar an taifeadadh ón tús agus téigh beo nuair is mian libh.
waiting.recordingNotice: Tá an t-imeacht seo á thaifeadadh.
waiting.recordingAvailableAfter: Beidh an taifeadadh ar fáil tar éis an imeachta.
waiting.autoRefreshHint: Nuashonróidh an leathanach go huathoibríoch nuair a thosóidh an t-imeacht.
waiting.peopleWaiting: {count, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 duine ag fanacht} one {# duine ag fanacht} two {# dhuine ag fanacht} few {# dhuine ag fanacht} many {# nduine ag fanacht} other {{count} duine ag fanacht}}
waiting.jvbScalingDetail: Tá na freastalaithe físe ag tosú. Tógann sé seo thart ar 2 nóiméad.
waiting.warmingUpDetail: We're spinning up the video servers. Get yourself ready in the meantime — everything will be live in 2-3 minutes.
waiting.netiquetteBullet1: Arrive a few minutes early to test your microphone and camera
waiting.netiquetteBullet2: Turn camera and mic on only when speaking — raise your hand to request the floor
waiting.netiquetteBullet3: Use chat for quick exchanges, Q&A for questions to the speakers
waiting.netiquetteBullet4: Recording, when enabled, is controlled by moderators and marked with a red indicator
waiting.watchCatchupDesc: Watch the partial recording and catch up with the live stream when you want
waiting.chatPreviewHint: Read what other participants are saying while you get ready
waiting.startEventError: Error starting the event. Please try again.
waiting.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
waiting.chatLockedMessage: Enter your name to join the event chat.

recording.publishDesc: Déan an físeán inrochtana ar leathanach an imeachta

retention.forever: Choíche (go dtí dul in éag an imeachta)

recording.retentionNote: Leanfaidh an físeán coinneáil GDPR an imeachta fós
recording.deleteConfirm: An bhfuil sibh cinnte? Scriosfar an físeán go buan.
recording.notConfigured: Níl Jibri cumraithe. Níl taifeadadh físe ar fáil.
recording.disabledHint: Video recording is not enabled for this event. To enable it open the Settings section above and toggle "Recording" on.

postEvent.pageVisible: Leathanach an imeachta infheicthe tar éis deiridh
postEvent.feedbackEnabled: Suirbhé aiseolais gníomhach ag deireadh an imeachta
postEvent.dataRetentionNote: Scriosfar sonraí pearsanta na rannpháirtithe de réir choinneáil an imeachta ({days} lá). Fanfaidh ábhar an imeachta ar fáil fad is atá an leathanach infheicthe.
postEvent.availableUntil: Beidh an t-imeacht seo agus a ábhar ar fáil go dtí {date}.

provisioning.descriptionFromIdle: The room had been paused due to inactivity to save energy. We're restarting it now — this usually takes 2-3 minutes.
provisioning.descriptionColdStart: We're setting up the virtual room for this event. It takes about 2-3 minutes: you'll be redirected automatically when everything is ready.
provisioning.tempError: Retrying to reach the server, no action needed.
provisioning.scaleToZeroNote: To reduce environmental impact, video nodes are powered off when nobody is in a call. They restart automatically on the first join.

optOut.title: Remove me from the DTD address book
optOut.intro: You are about to withdraw your consent to be listed in the DTD address book. After confirmation you will no longer be contacted for invitations to similar events.
optOut.missingToken: The link is invalid or incomplete. Please check the original email.
optOut.invalidToken: The link is expired or invalid. Contact the event organizer for help.
optOut.notFound: No person matches this link — they may already have been removed.
optOut.previewHeader: You are about to remove from the address book:
optOut.warning: This does not delete historical event registrations.
optOut.successBody: Your data is no longer in the DTD address book.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

deviceCheck.permissionNeeded: Allow camera and microphone to test them. You can also join without.

garden.peopleInGarden: {count, plural, =0 {Nobody in the garden} one {1 person in the garden} other {# people in the garden}}
garden.hintKeyboard: Move with WASD or arrow keys
garden.pickerHelp: This character represents you in the waiting garden. You can change it any time.
garden.hintBanner: Press the arrow keys to walk around the garden
